PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Sullivan for Anna Jovel (Petitioner). Mario Jovel on behalf of himself, Ruth Jovel and Armando Jovel (Beneficiaries).

Mr. Sullivan stated that they arrived at a settlement, that one of the Beneficiaries would like to buy out the others at conclusion of probate and that he will attach the settlement agreement to Petition for Final Distribution when filed. In addition, Mr. Sullivan stated that they agreed to his Client being appointed with limited authority and that he will amend his petition. Mr. Jovel stated that he had no objection, that he wanted to make sure the youngest Sister has the opportunity to purchase the house and that he waived notice on the amended petition. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary appointing Anna Jovel as Executor with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required (bond already filed per Mr. Sullivan).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
